mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PRODUCT_COMMENT ( PRD_SN, USR_SN, PRD_CMT_TTL, PRD_CMT_CN, PRD_CMT_REG_ID, PRD_CMT_UPDT_ID ) VALUES ( #{prdSn}, #{usrSn}, #{prdCmtTtl}, #{prdCmtCn}, #{prdCmtRegId}, #{prdCmtUpdtId} )
mapper.select: SELECT PRD_CMT_SN AS prdCmtSn, PRD_CMT_TTL AS prdCmtTtl, PRD_CMT_CN AS prdCmtCn, PRD_CMT_REG_DT AS prdCmtRegDt, PRD_CMT_UPDT_DT AS prdCmtUpdtDt FROM PRODUCT_COMMENT WHERE PRD_SN = #{prdSn} ORDER BY PRD_CMT_SN DESC LIMIT #{limit}
